review_snippet: Manuel Antonio is perfect for families — wildlife trails, beaches, and pools within 10 minutes.
Arenal Volcano, Monteverde cloud forest and Manuel Antonio cover every family preference.
Ubud for culture, Seminyak for beach and shopping — Bali has something for everyone.
Bali blends Hindu temples, terraced rice paddies, world-class surf and vibrant arts. Budget options widely available.
Lisbon has the best food scene in Europe for vegetarians. The Alfama district and tram rides are unmissable.
Sintra with kids was magical — easy day trip from Lisbon. Pena Palace looks like a fairy tale.
Japan rewards the curious. From shinkansen to ramen alleyways, there is nowhere quite like it on earth.
Kyoto in spring is one of the great travel experiences. Cherry blossoms, temples, and extraordinary food.
San Gimignano, Siena, and Chianti wine country — as romantic and culturally rich as anywhere in the world.
Rolling hills, hilltop towns, world-class art and extraordinary food — the great slow-travel destination.
The Great Migration is one of the greatest wildlife spectacles on earth. Lions, cheetahs, hundreds of elephants.
Ha Long Bay, Hoi An street food and Hanoi — impossibly good value and incredibly diverse.
Vietnam stretches 1600km and packs in karsts, rice paddies, beaches and buzzing cities.
Seoul never sleeps. Street food in Myeongdong, K-pop in Hongdae, palaces — all within subway reach.
Water villa in North Male Atoll — turtles, rays and reef sharks every snorkel session. Worth every penny.
Iceland rewards the adventurous — waterfalls, geysers, lava fields and the Northern Lights.
Fiordland, the Tongariro crossing, and Milford Sound — New Zealand packs extraordinary scenery into a compact country.
Sagrada Familia, La Boqueria, and Barceloneta Beach — Barcelona is endlessly photogenic and culturally rich.
Fes medina is a living medieval city. Marrakech is chaotic but spectacular. Allow extra days everywhere.
Santorini sunsets are everything you imagine. Crete offers incredible food, history and beaches in one island.
Hawaii Volcanoes National Park, Na Pali Coast and world-class surf — the islands are extraordinary for all ages.
Viking River Cruise from Budapest to Amsterdam — perfect pace for seniors, no luggage hauling, fascinating towns.
Plitvice Lakes for hiking, Split for Roman ruins, Dubrovnik for drama — culture, hiking and beach in one compact country.
Thailand covers tropical islands, mountain temples, street food markets and world-class diving in a single itinerary.
Machu Picchu at sunrise is genuinely life-changing. Cusco, the Sacred Valley, and Peruvian cuisine seal the deal.
